item.title: My First Post
item.description:
About Me

I am Ahshan Khan, currently doing my B.Tech in MnC at IIT Jammu. I am interested in math, programming, chess, and anime. I am starting this technical blog to write about my projects and document my journey of building them.

Tech Stack

I know C, C++, Python, HTML, CSS, JS, Flask, Hugo, Godot, and GDScript.

  • DSA: I use C++ for solving problems.
  • Web Dev: I learned basic full-stack development using Flask.
  • Game Dev: I have experimented with Godot and GDScript.

Projects

Now, I am moving ahead to build some rigorous projects to learn new things. Stay tuned for updates!
